headlines.text: U.S. Navy blockade of Iranian ports takes effect at 10 a.m. ET after peace talks collapse in Pakistan
Trump threatens to sink Iranian ships that approach the blockade; Iran calls it 'piracy'
Viktor Orban ousted after 16 years as Hungary's PM; Peter Magyar wins landslide supermajority
Oil tops $104 a barrel as Strait of Hormuz blockade rattles global energy markets
Pope Leo XIV fires back at Trump: 'I have no fear of the Trump administration'
Rep. Eric Swalwell drops California governor bid after sexual misconduct allegations
Euphoria Season 3 premieres on HBO — Rue, Zendaya, and chaos are finally back after 4-year hiatus
Trump threatens 50% China tariffs if Beijing ships air defense weapons to Iran
UK, France refuse to join U.S. blockade; Macron proposes multinational peaceful mission for Hormuz
Goldman Sachs posts near-record quarter but shares fall 4% on disappointing fixed-income trading

breaking.text: U.S. naval blockade of all Iranian ports now in effect as of 10 a.m. ET. Iran warns no port in the Persian Gulf will be safe.

stories.hed: U.S. Navy Slams the Door on Iran's Ports as Peace Talks Crater
stories.dek: After 21 hours of negotiations in Islamabad went nowhere, the U.S. military began blockading all maritime traffic in and out of Iranian ports at 10 a.m. ET Monday. Trump said any Iranian ships that come near the blockade will be 'immediately eliminated' — a threat Iran's navy chief called 'ridiculous and funny,' which is a very bold thing to say to a man who just mined your coast.

stories.hed: Hungary Dumps Orban After 16 Years in a Landslide for Democracy
stories.dek: Peter Magyar's Tisza party steamrolled Viktor Orban's Fidesz on Sunday, winning a two-thirds supermajority on 53.6% of the vote — the highest Hungarian turnout since the fall of communism. JD Vance had personally campaigned for Orban days before the vote, which should probably go in some kind of endorsement hall of shame.

stories.hed: Swalwell Exits California Governor's Race Amid Misconduct Allegations
stories.dek: Rep. Eric Swalwell suspended his California gubernatorial campaign after sexual misconduct allegations caused an immediate collapse — staffers quit, Democratic supporters bailed, and the whole thing fell apart faster than a campaign promise. He posted an apology on X, which is also where his political career now lives.

stories.hed: Congress Eyes Expulsion of Up to Four Lawmakers This Week
stories.dek: The House of Representatives could move to expel as many as four members this week — two Democrats and two Republicans — over a wave of ethical and misconduct allegations. Bipartisan agreement is rare in Washington, but apparently mutual disgrace is a unifying force.

stories.hed: Trump Posts Himself as Jesus After Attacking the Pope — On the Same Day
stories.dek: After publicly attacking Pope Leo XIV as 'weak' and 'terrible for foreign policy,' Trump posted an AI illustration of himself as Jesus Christ on social media. Evangelical and Catholic allies called the post 'blasphemous' in a rare public break from the base. The Pope, for his part, said he had 'no fear of the Trump administration,' which is also something Jesus might have said.

markets.context: Stocks reversed early losses and oil surged past $100/barrel after the U.S. imposed its Hormuz blockade; Goldman Sachs dragged the Dow lower despite a near-record earnings quarter.

gas.note: Congrats on your $4 gas — analysts say it could be $5 by Memorial Day, so enjoy the 'cheap' fill-up while it lasts.

popCulture.hed: Euphoria Season 3 Premieres on HBO After Four-Year Wait — And Rue Is Still a Mess
popCulture.dek: The long-awaited third season of Euphoria dropped Sunday night on HBO Max, featuring a five-year time jump that puts Zendaya's Rue deep in debt to a drug lord as a literal mule, while Cassie is engaged to Nate and running an OnlyFans-style platform. Creator Sam Levinson confirmed this will likely be the final season, which means America has approximately eight Sundays left to figure out what to do with itself.

genZ.definition: A viral Gen Z slang term from TikTok that originated from a misheard lyric in Hunxho's song 'Birthday Girl' — specifically the line 'she eat, she the birthday girl' heard as 'she eat, she the birthday.' It functions as a compliment that can also be backhanded, sort of like calling someone 'special.' Multiple explainer videos have racked up hundreds of thousands of views in the past week as confused millennials demand answers.
genZ.usage: Iran refusing to give up its nuclear program at the Islamabad talks? Iran is NOT the birthday. JD Vance flying home empty-handed? Also not the birthday.

tldr: The U.S. Navy began blockading Iranian ports today after peace talks in Pakistan collapsed after 21 hours, sending oil above $104/barrel and rattling global markets. Meanwhile, Hungary booted Trump ally Viktor Orban in a historic landslide, Euphoria returned to HBO, and Trump found time to both attack the Pope and post himself as Jesus — all before noon.
